announcementDetail.title: Healthcare Innovation
announcementDetail.introduction: Modern healthcare systems are developing rapidly thanks to technological innovations. Electronic health record (EHR) systems, telehealth, wearable devices, and more are changing the way patients and doctors interact. These technologies play an important role in monitoring patients' health status in real time and providing better treatment outcomes.
announcementDetail.ehrContent: An electronic health record (EHR) system is a system that digitizes and stores all of a patient's health information. The system allows healthcare providers to easily access and share patients' medical records. This greatly improves the accuracy and efficiency of treatment and reduces duplicate tests and treatments.
announcementDetail.telemedicineContent: Telemedicine is a system that allows patients to receive treatment without having to face a doctor in person. Using the Internet and digital devices, patients can receive treatment at home, which is especially helpful for patients who have difficulty moving around or who live in rural areas. Telemedicine contributes to increasing access to healthcare and reducing healthcare costs.
announcementDetail.wearableDevicesContent: Wearable devices are used to monitor patients' health status in real time. For example, smart watches or fitness bands measure heart rate, blood pressure, activity level, etc., allowing users to check their health status. These devices can be a huge help in managing your health and enable quick response in emergency situations.

Electronic Health Records (EHR) systems, remote healthcare, wearable devices, and more are transforming the way patients and doctors interact. These technologies play an important role in real-time monitoring of patients' health status and providing better treatment outcomes.
